mapper.select: SELECT id, code, product_sku_code, location_id, planned_quantity, status, planned_start_date, version, placed_at, released_at, completed_at FROM work_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT count(*) FROM work_order WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order (id, code, product_sku_code, location_id, planned_quantity, status, planned_start_date, version, placed_at, released_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.code}, #{row.productSkuCode}, #{row.locationId}, #{row.plannedQuantity}, #{row.status}, #{row.plannedStartDate}, #{row.version}, #{row.placedAt}, #{row.releasedAt}, #{row.completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET code = #{row.code}, product_sku_code = #{row.productSkuCode}, location_id = #{row.locationId}, planned_quantity = #{row.plannedQuantity}, status = #{row.status}, planned_start_date = #{row.plannedStartDate}, version = #{row.version}, released_at = #{row.releasedAt}, completed_at = #{row.completedAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM work_order WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT work_order_id, line_no, component_sku_code, quantity_per_unit FROM work_order_component WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} ORDER BY line_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order_component (work_order_id, line_no, component_sku_code, quantity_per_unit) VALUES (#{row.workOrderId}, #{row.lineNo}, #{row.componentSkuCode}, #{row.quantityPerUnit})
